mapper.select: SELECT a.name AS admin_name, board_no AS num, title, content, saveFilename, originalFilename, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at, TO_CHAR(updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updated_at, TO_CHAR(start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS start_date, TO_CHAR(end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS end_date FROM board LEFT OUTER JOIN admin_detail a ON a.member_id = board.member_id WHERE board_no = #{num} AND block = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE board_no = #{num}
mapper.select:
SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM board
INSTR(title, #{kwd}) > 0
AND type = 'NOTICE' AND block = 0

SELECT a.name AS admin_name, board_no AS num, title, content, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at, TO_CHAR(updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updated_at FROM board LEFT OUTER JOIN admin_detail a ON a.member_id = board.member_id
INSTR(title, #{kwd}) > 0
AND type = 'NOTICE' AND block = 0
ORDER BY board_no DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM board WHERE type = 'EVENT' AND block = 0

SELECT a.name AS admin_name, board_no AS num, title, content, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at, TO_CHAR(updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updated_at, TO_CHAR(start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS start_date, TO_CHAR(end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS end_date FROM board LEFT OUTER JOIN admin_detail a ON a.member_id = board.member_id WHERE type = 'EVENT' AND block = 0 ORDER BY board_no DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT board_no AS num, title, content FROM board WHERE type = 'FAQ' AND block = 0 ORDER BY board_no DESC
